answers.answer: B) Consistency - use eventual consistency to stay available. CAP theorem requires choosing between C and A during partition. E-commerce shopping cart prioritizes availability over strong consistency.

ROOT CAUSE: Certificate rotation used cipher suite unsupported by sidecar proxy v1.8.

CAUSAL CHAIN: Certificate rotation -> TLS handshake failures (2%) -> Service call timeouts (5%) -> Retry storm (3x retries) -> Connection pool exhausted (500) -> Inventory rejects connections -> Order circuit breaker trips (503) -> CDN cache expires -> Load balancer removes instance -> Remaining instances overloaded -> Cascade failure -> Full outage.

AMPLIFICATION FACTORS: Retry storm, CDN cache expiry.

PREVENTIVE MITIGATIONS: Pre-deployment compatibility testing, rate limiting on retries, connection pool alerts at 80%, CDN stale-while-revalidate, gradual certificate rollout.
